etymology.description: Depicts two entangled ropes -> to entangle; to intertwine -> original form of įģū(įģū) (jiÅŦ, "entangle")
etymology.interpretation: The character äļĐ(äļĐ) (jiÅŦ, "twist") visually represents intertwined ropes, emphasizing the action of entangling or twisting. This character served as the original form of įģū(įģū) (jiÅŦ, "entangle"), maintaining its meaning through depiction.
